properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've no need of wealth or fame There is nothing I could gain that could pay the debt and wash away my sins I have only this one hope There's no other friend I know that could set me free and give me life again.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I need thee; oh, I need thee every hour I need thee Oh bless me now my savior I come to thee.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'll not cling to words of man There's no peace in my own plans I will lay my life in hands that will endure And though time shall pass away Earth and sky no more remain I know your word stands unchanged your promise sure.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Oh, make me thine; make me thine indeed Oh, be my all; be my everything Oh, here's my heart; it is yours my King I come :/
